shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "partial pre-rendering app framework deployment" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc "printf '%s\\n' '--- app/page.tsx ---' && sed -n '1,260p' app/page.tsx && printf '%s\\n' '--- app/layout.tsx ---' && sed -n '1,220p' app/layout.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc "printf '%s\\n' '--- tsconfig ---' && sed -n '1,220p' tsconfig.json && printf '%s\\n' '--- all source ---' && rg --files app | sort"

/bin/bash -lc "test -d node_modules && node -p \"require('./node_modules/next/package.json').version\" || true; rg -n \"ppr|partial.*prerender|cacheComponents\" node_modules/next/dist/server/config* node_modules/next/dist 2>/dev/null | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc 'rg -n -C 3 "cacheComponents: true|experimental.*ppr|ppr: true|partial prerender" node_modules/next/dist/docs node_modules/next/dist/server 2>/dev/null | head -180'

/bin/bash -lc "node -e \"const c=require('./next.config.ts');\" 2>/dev/null || true; node -e \"JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('tsconfig.json','utf8')); console.log('tsconfig valid')\"; rg -n \"cacheComponents\" next.config.ts; test -f .next/server/app/index.html && echo 'static shell generated' || true"

/bin/bash -lc "nmem --json m add \"This Next.js app uses next 16.2.0-canary.41, where partial pre-rendering is enabled with the top-level cacheComponents: true setting in next.config.ts. The legacy experimental.ppr flag is rejected by this version. The app's Suspense-wrapped async product and recommendation sections build as a static shell with dynamic server-streamed content.\" -t \"Next.js PPR configuration\" --unit-type decision -l \"nextjs\" -l \"ppr\" -s codex -i 0.8"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
